---
title: "CS 4720 · Distributed Systems · Fall 2026"
author: "Prof. Kim"
date: "2026-09-01"
format: html
---

## 강의 개요
분산 시스템의 핵심 패턴 — consistency, fault tolerance, distributed transactions.

## Schedule
| Wk | Topic | Reading | Lab |
|----|-------|---------|-----|
| 1 | CAP theorem | Brewer 2000 | – |
| 2 | RPC | Birrell & Nelson | gRPC ping |
| 3 | Consensus · Paxos | Lamport 1998 | Paxos in Go |
| 4 | Raft | Ongaro 2014 | Raft impl |
| ... | | | |

## Grading
- 4 labs (10% each) = 40%
- midterm = 25%
- final project = 35%
